reviews.comment:
Para quien trabaja visitando ciudades, las YPF FULL son una opción imperdible...limpieza, aire acondicionado, sanitarios y hasta duchas en algunos. Sumado a que no debes apartarte de tu ruta.

(Translated by Google)
For those who work traveling to different cities, YPF FULL stations are an unmissable option...cleanliness, air conditioning, restrooms, and even showers in some. Plus, you don't have to go out of your way.
